announcements.title: sf-pi v0.152.0 — sf-skills: rewrite as a Skill Funnel governance manager
announcements.body: sf-skills: rewrite as a Skill Funnel governance manager — sf-skills: remove non-null assertions to satisfy eslint --max-warnings=0

announcements.title: sf-pi requires pi 0.73 or newer
announcements.body: Current sf-pi builds require pi 0.73 or newer. Run `pi update` before upgrading sf-pi; PI_CODING_AGENT_SESSION_DIR remains supported for relocating session storage.
